subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: Those who lack wisdom think that the worlds of God are limited to the material universe. They deny that there are spiritual realms.
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @soul; spirit after death, @realms of being; three realms; five realms
